results.rendered_html:
nidarśaka (von darś mit ni) adj.
1〉 eine Einsicht habend in, schauend; jñānatattvaparo nityaṃ śubhāśubhanidarśakaḥ  MBH. 12,7846 . manastvapahṛtaṃ pūrvamindriyārthanidarśakam . na samakṣaguṇāpekṣi nirguṇasya nidarśakam .. 7472 . 13,6617 .
— 2〉 anzeigend, verkündend: ulkāpātāśca bahavo mahābhayanidarśakāḥ  MBH. 3,13086 . vṛttavartiṣyamāṇānāṃ kathāṃśānāṃ nidarśakaḥ (viṣkambhaḥ)  DAŚAR. 1,53 .
